speaker: speaker1
text: Hey , did you hear about Jessica's party this weekend ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Yeah , but I'm still waiting for my invitation .

speaker: speaker1
text: Oh really ? She gave me mine earlier today .

speaker: speaker2
text: Well , she'll probably just give me my invitation later on today .

speaker: speaker1
text: Yeah , so are you planning on going ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I think so . It sounds like it's going to be a lot of fun .

speaker: speaker1
text: It really does , I can't wait .

speaker: speaker2
text: What time does the party start ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Oh , well , how many people has she given invites to so far ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I'm not sure , but I don't think she's given out that many .

speaker: speaker2
text: Well , hopefully she'll give me my invite later on today .
